intended_use: SubtleSYNTH is a software as a medical device consisting of a software machine learning algorithm that synthesizes a SynthSTIR contrast image of a case from T1-weighted and T2-weighted spine MR images
intended_use_full: SubtleSYNTH is a software as a medical device consisting of a software machine learning algorithm that synthesizes a SynthSTIR contrast image of a case from T1-weighted and T2-weighted spine MR images.
target_condition: Spine MRI imaging; conditions evaluated include degenerative disease, infection, trauma, cord lesions, non-cord lesions, vascular abnormalities, hemorrhage, and normal findings
ground_truth: Acquired (reference) STIR images and radiologist classification into primary and secondary diagnostic categories
other_metrics: Root Mean Square Error (RMSE): 0.39 in normalized intensity units; Cosine similarity matrix: all elements above 0.9; Interchangeability Study A: 2.12% (95% CI [-1.31%, 5.88%]) by GLMM, 2.17% (95% CI [-0.25%, 4.87%]) by bootstrap; Interchangeability Study B: 0.63% (95% CI [-4.19%, 5.9%]) by GLMM, 0.64% (95% CI [-3.34%, 4.50%]) by bootstrap; Bland-Altman analysis showed no significant bias with 99% confidence interval analysis
